title: AN ACT CREATING TWO(2) ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES IN THE CITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE SECTION 29 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980

chunks.text:
H. No. 3404 / 19 VLD 2d 61

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9274, March 21, 2004 ]

AN ACT CREATING TWO(2) ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES IN THE CITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE SECTION 29 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. The Chief Justice of the Supreme Court in coordination with the Secretary of the Department of Justice shall immediately include in the Court's program the operationalization of two (2) additional municipal trial court branches for the City of Roxas, Province of Capiz, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

AQUILINO Q. PIMENTEL JR.

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 11, 2003 and January 23, 2004, respectively.

(Sgd.)

LUTGARDO B. BARBO

(Sgd.)

ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 21 2004

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
